legal_description.value: Lot 322, SHAMROCK ESTATES PHASE 2A, according to the plat of record in the office of the County Recorder of Maricopa County, Arizona, recorded in Book 799 of Maps, Page 38

consideration.value: Pursuant to Decree of Dissolution of Marriage recorded as Instrument No. 20210200001; no other consideration

vesting.value: SOFIA ANDREA MARTINEZ, as her sole and separate property

source_note.value: Demo-only synthesized quit claim deed for Martinez parcel 304-77-555 — conveys Carlos's community-property interest to Sofia pursuant to the divorce decree (20210200001). NOTE: a Q/CL conveys only whatever interest the grantor has, with no warranty. The underlying 2016 DOT (20160200002) is not released by this deed; Carlos remains on the note. Not present in publicapi.recorder.maricopa.gov.

raw_api_response.synthesized_note: Demo-only post-divorce quit claim deed for Martinez parcel 304-77-555; not present in publicapi.recorder.maricopa.gov.
